Common.brandDescription: Premium Greek and Mediterranean food export specialists, serving wholesalers and retailers across Europe since 2008.

slide1.title: Greek & Mediterranean Food Export Specialists
slide1.subtitle: Premium Feta, Halloumi, Greek Yogurt and Mediterranean Products for European Retail & Food Service.

slide2.title: Authentic Taste. Reliable Supply.
slide2.subtitle: Supplying wholesalers, retailers and food service partners across Europe.

slide3.title: Serving Europe Since 2008
slide3.subtitle: Reliable export logistics for France, Italy, Spain and Belgium.

slide4.title: Tailored Solutions For Retail & Food Service
slide4.subtitle: Private label and Mediterranean food sourcing solutions.

preview.title: Our Mediterranean Heritage
preview.text1: SIMOS Mediterranean Food specializes in the selection and export of the finest Greek and Mediterranean products. With over 15 years of experience, we connect traditional producers with the European market.
preview.text2: Our commitment to quality and authenticity has made us a trusted partner for wholesalers and retailers across France, Italy, Spain, and Belgium.

Markets.title: Export Markets
Markets.description: We provide localized expertise and reliable supply chains across key European markets.

meta.title: Quality & Certifications | SIMOS Mediterranean Food
meta.description: Discover SIMOS Mediterranean Food quality standards, traceability systems, certified production partnerships and dependable European dairy distribution.

hero.title: Quality Without Compromise
hero.subtitle: From certified Mediterranean producers to reliable European distribution networks, SIMOS delivers authentic dairy products with complete traceability, rigorous quality standards and dependable service.
hero.imageAlt: Mediterranean dairy sourcing and quality assurance presentation
hero.cardImageAlt: Food quality verification and product control process

commitment.title: A Culture of Quality
commitment.description: Quality at SIMOS is built through disciplined sourcing, documented controls and long-term producer relationships that protect product integrity from origin to final delivery.

certifiedPartners.title: Certified Production Partners
certifiedPartners.description: We collaborate with producers operating under recognised food safety and quality frameworks aligned with international retail expectations.

monitoredSupplyChain.title: Monitored Supply Chain
monitoredSupplyChain.description: Product quality is reviewed throughout sourcing, processing, storage and export coordination to maintain consistency across every shipment.

foodSafety.title: Food Safety Focus
foodSafety.description: Hygiene, specification compliance, batch control and product integrity remain central priorities in every dairy and Mediterranean category we handle.

authenticSourcing.title: Authentic Mediterranean Sourcing
authenticSourcing.description: We protect the origin, identity and sensory profile of the products we represent, with a clear focus on authentic Mediterranean dairy specialities.

longTermStandards.title: Long-Term Product Stability
longTermStandards.description: Stable producer partnerships and clear quality expectations support repeatable standards, reliable supply and buyer confidence over time.

control.title: Quality Control at Every Stage
control.description: Our process is designed to reduce sourcing risk, improve product transparency and maintain dependable performance across certified production and export logistics.

supplierVerification.title: Supplier Verification
supplierVerification.description: Producer capabilities, documentation and category fit are reviewed before a product enters our sourcing portfolio.

productionMonitoring.title: Production Monitoring
productionMonitoring.description: We stay close to production partners to confirm that specifications, packaging and agreed quality parameters remain aligned.

productInspections.title: Product Inspections
productInspections.description: Appearance, format, packaging integrity and key commercial specifications are checked before products move into export flow.

batchControl.title: Batch Control
batchControl.description: Every commercial batch is linked to production and shipment records so products can be tracked with speed and precision.

continuousAssessment.title: Continuous Assessment
continuousAssessment.description: Performance is reviewed continuously so that quality, service level and customer expectations stay aligned over the long term.

traceability.title: Complete Product Traceability
traceability.description: SIMOS maintains documented visibility from producer selection to final customer delivery, helping buyers make informed sourcing decisions with confidence.

highlights.aToZ: Traceability from A to Z across product flow, batch records and delivery coordination.
highlights.transparency: Product transparency that supports retailer, importer and food service requirements.
highlights.visibility: Supply chain visibility for origin, handling, packaging and shipment status.
highlights.compliance: Regulatory compliance supported by clear documentation and auditable records.

stepDescriptions.0: Approved producers are selected according to category expertise, operational reliability and certification profile.
stepDescriptions.1: Processing and packing data are linked to the product specification, format and commercial batch reference.
stepDescriptions.2: Quality checks and document review confirm alignment before the order moves into export execution.
stepDescriptions.3: Storage, dispatch and delivery coordination are tracked to protect product condition and service consistency.
stepDescriptions.4: Buyers receive dependable product flow supported by documented visibility from origin to destination.

standards.title: Recognised International Standards
standards.description: Depending on category, destination market and production partner, our sourcing network includes facilities operating under recognised certification and assurance schemes.
standards.note: Certification availability depends on the selected producer, product category and production site. SIMOS presents these standards as part of its certified sourcing network and partner capability profile.

cards.ifs: IFS Food is widely used to assess food safety, product quality and operational consistency in food manufacturing and packing environments.
cards.brcgs: BRCGS standards are recognised by major retailers and importers for structured food safety systems, documented controls and product integrity.
cards.bioHellas: BIO Hellas supports certified organic control and verification for businesses operating in line with recognised organic production requirements.
cards.agrocert: Agrocert-related schemes support recognised agri-food quality frameworks connected with product identity, agricultural standards and market trust.
cards.halal: Halal certification is relevant for buyers requiring approved ingredients, controlled processes and documented compliance for Muslim consumer markets.
cards.kosher: Kosher certification supports access to markets where ingredient review, processing controls and religious compliance are commercial priorities.

logistics.title: Reliable Delivery, Consistent Quality
logistics.description: For international dairy and Mediterranean food distribution, logistics is part of quality assurance. Service precision, cold-chain discipline and delivery visibility protect the final buying experience.
logistics.imageAlt: European food distribution and warehouse logistics

points.edi: Full EDI integration for efficient order processing and supply chain coordination.
points.carton: Delivery by carton to support flexible replenishment and mixed-order requirements.
points.noMoq: No minimum order quantity for buyers requiring agility across multiple SKUs.
points.markets: Distribution coverage across France, Spain, Belgium and Italy.
points.partner: Logistics execution supported through the Logifrio Madrid partnership.
points.daily: Daily deliveries except Sunday to maintain service continuity.
points.service: High service-level performance focused on accuracy, responsiveness and dependable arrival windows.

buyers.title: Why International Buyers Choose SIMOS
buyers.description: Importers, distributors, wholesalers, retailers and Horeca buyers rely on SIMOS for structured sourcing, stable execution and professional market understanding.

certifiedProduction.title: Certified Production
certifiedProduction.description: We work with production partners selected for their quality systems, category know-how and export readiness.

traceability.title: Traceability
traceability.description: Documented batch visibility supports accountability from origin through final delivery.

foodSafety.title: Food Safety
foodSafety.description: Food safety expectations remain central in sourcing decisions, product checks and logistics coordination.

europeanDistribution.title: European Distribution
europeanDistribution.description: Established distribution flows support dependable service across key European markets.

privateLabel.title: Private Label Expertise
privateLabel.description: We support retail and food service customers with specification-led private label development and execution.

flexibleOrdering.title: Flexible Ordering
flexibleOrdering.description: Carton-level delivery, no MOQ flexibility and responsive coordination help buyers move faster.

finalCta.title: Looking for a Certified Mediterranean Dairy Partner?
finalCta.description: Speak with our team about sourcing solutions, private label opportunities and certified Mediterranean dairy products.
